content:
---

## ♃ JUPITER (Design) — Gate 54.2

**Theme**: Ambition → Material Rise
**Trait**: You climb naturally through alliances and vision.
**Line 2**: Your climb is elegant, but unconscious.

---

## ♄ SATURN (Personality) — Gate 21.4

**Theme**: Control / Sovereignty
**Trait**: Lessons around personal control vs shared power.
**Line 4**: Control best expressed in service to a group.

---

## ♄ SATURN (Design) — Gate 61.2

**Theme**: Mystery / Inspiration
**Trait**: You face pressure to answer the unknowable.
**Line 2**: Genius emerges in solitude. Needs peace to access insight.

---

## ♅ URANUS (Personality) — Gate 51.6

**Theme**: Shock → Awakening
**Trait**: You challenge comfort zones. Catalyst energy.
**Line 6**: Role model of bravery. Others observe your fearless leap.
